parts.text:
"# Save named configurations

I have a small web app for practicing jazz chords: https://github.com/karin112358/jazz-chord-flashcards. Right now you can adjust the settings to build one custom configuration, but there's no way to keep more than one â€” as soon as you change the settings, the previous setup is gone.

I'd like to be able to save a configuration under a name and come back to it later. So: give the current settings a name, store it in the browser's local storage, and let me pick one of my saved configurations to load it again. Being able to rename or delete a saved configuration would be nice too.

Take a look at the repo to understand how the configuration works today, then write up a detailed plan for implementing this. Cover what files and components need to change, how the saved configurations should be structured in local storage, and what the UI for naming, saving, loading and managing them should look like. Please save the plan as a Markdown file â€” I just want the plan for now, not the implementation.
"
I'll start by exploring the repository to understand how the configuration works today, then create a detailed plan for implementing the named configurations feature.
Now let me read the configuration-related files to understand how the current configuration system works:

1: import {
2:   AfterViewInit,
3:   ChangeDetectionStrategy,
4:   Component,
5:   effect,
6:   ElementRef,
7:   HostListener,
8:   OnInit,
9:   signal,
10:   untracked,
11:   ViewChild,
12:   WritableSignal,
13: } from '@angular/core';
14: import { MatDialog } from '@angular/material/dialog';
15: import { exercises, keys, keysSharp, modes } from 'src/app/model/configuration';
16: import { ToneService } from 'src/app/services/tone.service';
17: import { KeysDialogComponent } from '../keys-dialog/keys-dialog.component';
18: import { KeysConfiguration } from 'src/app/model/keys-configuration';
19: 
20: type Chord = {
21:   index: number;
22:   chord: string;
23: };
24: 
25: @Component({
26:   selector: 'app-player',
27:   templateUrl: './player.component.html',
28:   styleUrls: ['./player.component.scss'],
29:   changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush,
30:   standalone: false,
31: })
32: export class PlayerComponent implements OnInit, AfterViewInit {
33:   @ViewChild('silentAudio') silentAudio!: ElementRef<HTMLAudioElement>;
34: 
35:   @HostListener('document:keyup', ['$event'])
36:   handleKeyboardEvent(event: KeyboardEvent) {
37:     if (
38:       event.target &&
39:       'localName' in event.target &&
40:       event.target.localName === 'textarea'
41:     ) {
42:       return;
43:     }
44: 
45:     if (event.key === ' ') {
46:       if (this.isRunning()) {
47:         this.stop();
48:       } else {
49:         this.start();
50:       }
51:     } else if (event.key === 'Escape') {
52:       this.closeShortcuts();
53:     } else if (event.key === 'ArrowLeft') {
54:       let newTempo = this.toneService.tempo();
55:       if (event.ctrlKey) {
56:         newTempo -= 10;
57:       } else if (event.shiftKey) {
58:         newTempo -= 5;
59:       } else {
60:         newTempo--;
61:       }
62: 
63:       this.setTempo(newTempo);
64:     } else if (event.key === 'ArrowRight') {
65:       let newTempo = this.toneService.tempo();
66:       if (event.ctrlKey) {
67:         newTempo += 10;
68:       } else if (event.shiftKey) {
69:         newTempo += 5;
70:       } else {
71:         newTempo++;
72:       }
73: 
74:       this.setTempo(newTempo);
75:     }
76:   }
77: 
78:   minTempo = 20;
79:   maxTempo = 300;
80:   readonly currKey: WritableSignal<string | null> = signal(null);
81:   readonly nextKey1: WritableSignal<string | null> = signal(null);
82:   modes = modes;
83:   exercises = exercises;
84:   readonly selectedMode = signal<'R' | 'WC' | number>('R');
85:   readonly isRunning = signal(false);
86:   readonly selectedExercise: WritableSignal<{
87:     name: string;
88:     configuration: string | string[];
89:     root: string[];
90:   }> = signal(exercises[0]);
91: 
92:   private currentKeyIndex = -1;
93:   private nextKey1Index = -1;
94:   private keys = keys;
95:   private keysSharp = keysSharp;
96:   private initialized = false;
97:   private keysConfiguration: KeysConfiguration = new KeysConfiguration();
98:   private probabilityMap: { [key: number]: number } = {};
99:   private probabilityCount = 0;
100:   private cycle = 0;
101:   private cycleKeys: string[] = [];
102:   private nextChordTasks: Chord[] = [];
103:   private readonly keyRegex = new RegExp(/^[A-H]+#?b?/);
104: 
105:   constructor(
106:     public toneService: ToneService,
107:     private dialog: MatDialog,
108:   ) {
109:     effect(() => {
110:       const beat = this.toneService.beat();
111:       if (beat % 4 === 0) {
112:         untracked(() => {
113:           this.updateChord();
114:         });
115:       }
116:     });
117: 
118:     this.loadConfiguration();
119:     this.initialized = true;
120:   }
121: 
122:   ngOnInit(): void {}
123: 
124:   ngAfterViewInit(): void {
125:     this.silentAudio.nativeElement.loop = true;
126:   }
127: 
128:   start() {
129:     this.silentAudio.nativeElement.play();
130:     this.toneService.start();
131:     this.isRunning.set(true);
132:     this.cycle = 0;
133:     this.cycleKeys = [];
134:     (<any>window).sa_event('click_start');
135:   }
136: 
137:   stop() {
138:     this.silentAudio.nativeElement.pause();
139:     this.toneService.stop();
140: 
141:     this.currentKeyIndex = -1;
142:     this.nextKey1Index = -1;
143:     this.currKey.set(null);
144:     this.nextKey1.set(null);
145:     this.isRunning.set(false);
146:   }
147: 
148:   changeTempo(change: number) {
149:     if (change > 0) {
150:       if (this.toneService.tempo() + change > this.maxTempo) {
151:         this.toneService.setTempo(this.maxTempo);
152:       } else {
153:         this.toneService.setTempo(this.toneService.tempo() + change);
154:       }
155:     } else {
156:       if (this.toneService.tempo() + change < this.minTempo) {
157:         this.toneService.setTempo(this.minTempo);
158:       } else {
159:         this.toneService.setTempo(this.toneService.tempo() + change);
160:       }
161:     }
162: 
163:     this.saveConfiguration();
164:   }
165: 
166:   setTempo(newTempo: number | string) {
167:     if (typeof newTempo === 'string') {
168:       this.toneService.setTempo(parseInt(newTempo));
169:     } else {
170:       this.toneService.setTempo(newTempo);
171:     }
172: 
173:     this.saveConfiguration();
174:   }
175: 
176:   setMode(key: 'R' | 'WC' | number) {
177:     if (key) {
178:       this.selectedMode.set(key);
179:       this.saveConfiguration();
180:     }
181:   }
182: 
183:   setExercise(name: string) {
184:     if (name) {
185:       this.selectedExercise.set(
186:         this.exercises.find((c) => c.name === name) ?? this.exercises[0],
187:       );
188:       this.saveConfiguration();
189:     }
190:   }
191: 
192:   setCustomExercise(config: Event) {
193:     const custom = this.exercises.find((e) => e.name === 'Custom');
194:     if (custom) {
195:       const customExercise = (<HTMLTextAreaElement>config.target).value;
196:       custom.configuration = customExercise;
197:       localStorage.setItem('customExercise', customExercise);
198:     }
199:   }
200: 
201:   setPlayRootNote(value: boolean) {
202:     this.toneService.playRootNote = value;
203:     this.saveConfiguration();
204:   }
205: 
206:   openKeysDialog(): void {
207:     const dialogRef = this.dialog.open(KeysDialogComponent, {
208:       data: { keysConfiguration: this.keysConfiguration },
209:     });
210: 
211:     dialogRef.afterClosed().subscribe((result: any) => {
212:       this.saveConfiguration();
213:     });
214:   }
215: 
216:   private updateChord(): void {
217:     this.currKey.set(this.nextKey1() ?? '');
218:     this.currentKeyIndex = this.nextKey1Index;
219: 
220:     let nextChords: Chord[];
221:     let nextKey1: string = '';
222: 
223:     if (this.nextChordTasks.length) {
224:       nextChords = this.nextChordTasks;
225:       nextKey1 = nextChords[0].chord;
226:     } else {
227:       nextChords = this.getNextChords(this.currentKeyIndex);
228:       nextKey1 = nextChords[0].chord;
229: 
230:       while (nextKey1 === this.currKey()) {
231:         nextChords = this.getNextChords(this.currentKeyIndex);
232:         nextKey1 = nextChords[0].chord;
233:       }
234:     }
235: 
236:     let nextKey1Index = nextChords[0].index;
237:     nextKey1 = nextKey1.replace(/(\*)([0-9a-z()\#]+)(\*)/g, '<sup>$2</sup>');
238: 
239:     this.nextKey1.set(nextKey1);
240:     this.nextKey1Index = nextKey1Index;
241: 
242:     if (nextChords.length > 1) {
243:       this.nextChordTasks = nextChords.slice(1);
244:     } else {
245:       this.nextChordTasks = [];
246:     }
247: 
248:     const chords = nextKey1.split('-').map((chord) => chord.trim());
249: 
250:     if (chords.length === 1) {
251:       const key = chords[0].match(this.keyRegex)?.[0] ?? '';
252:       this.toneService.nextBarRoot = [key, key, key, key];
253:       this.toneService.walking = false;
254:     } else if (chords.length === 2) {
255:       const key0 = chords[0].match(this.keyRegex)?.[0] ?? '';
256:       const key1 = chords[1].match(this.keyRegex)?.[0] ?? '';
257:       this.toneService.nextBarRoot = [key0, key0, key1, key1];
258:       this.toneService.walking = false;
259:     } else if (chords.length === 3) {
260:       const key0 = chords[0].match(this.keyRegex)?.[0] ?? '';
261:       const key1 = chords[1].match(this.keyRegex)?.[0] ?? '';
262:       const key2 = chords[2].match(this.keyRegex)?.[0] ?? '';
263:       this.toneService.nextBarRoot = [key0, key1, key2, key2];
264:       this.toneService.walking = true;
265:     } else if (chords.length === 4) {
266:       const key0 = chords[0].match(this.keyRegex)?.[0] ?? '';
267:       const key1 = chords[1].match(this.keyRegex)?.[0] ?? '';
268:       const key2 = chords[2].match(this.keyRegex)?.[0] ?? '';
269:       const key3 = chords[3].match(this.keyRegex)?.[0] ?? '';
270:       this.toneService.nextBarRoot = [key0, key1, key2, key3];
271:       this.toneService.walking = true;
272:     } else {
273:       this.toneService.nextBarRoot = ['empty', 'empty', 'empty', 'empty'];
274:     }
275:   }
276: 
277:   private getNextChords(currentKeyIndex: number): Chord[] {
278:     let key = this.keys[currentKeyIndex];
279:     let keyIndex = 0;
280: 
281:     while (key === this.keys[currentKeyIndex]) {
282:       if (this.selectedMode() === 'R') {
283:         // Random mode
284:         const probabilityIndex = Math.floor(
285:           Math.random() * this.probabilityCount,
286:         );
287:         keyIndex = this.probabilityMap[probabilityIndex];
288:       } else if (this.selectedMode() === 'WC') {
289:         // Weighted Cycle mode
290:         while (this.cycleKeys.length === 0) {
291:           this.cycle++;
292:           this.cycleKeys = this.keysConfiguration.keys
293:             .filter((key) => this.cycle % key.rating === 0)
294:             .map((key) => key.key);
295:         }
296: 
297:         console.log('cycle', this.cycle, 'keys', this.cycleKeys);
298: 
299:         const key =
300:           this.cycleKeys[Math.floor(Math.random() * this.cycleKeys.length)];
301:         if (key) {
302:           keyIndex = this.keys.indexOf(key);
303:           this.cycleKeys = this.cycleKeys.filter((k) => k !== key);
304:         }
305:         // TODO
306:       } else {
307:         // Other modes
308:         const mode = this.selectedMode() as number;
309: 
310:         if (currentKeyIndex === -1) {
311:           currentKeyIndex = mode * -1;
312:         }
313: 
314:         keyIndex = (currentKeyIndex + mode) % this.keys.length;
315:         while (keyIndex < 0) {
316:           keyIndex += this.keys.length;
317:         }
318:       }
319: 
320:       key = this.keys[keyIndex];
321:     }
322: 
323:     let keys = this.keys;
324:     if (['G', 'D', 'A', 'E', 'B'].includes(this.keys[keyIndex])) {
325:       keys = this.keysSharp;
326:     }
327: 
328:     let config = this.selectedExercise().configuration;
329:     if (!Array.isArray(config)) {
330:       config = config.split('||');
331:     }
332: 
333:     if (Array.isArray(config)) {
334:       config = config[Math.floor(Math.random() * config.length)];
335:     }
336: 
337:     config = config.replace(/IIIb|iiib/g, keys[(keyIndex + 3) % 12]);
338:     config = config.replace(/III|iii/g, keys[(keyIndex + 4) % 12]);
339:     config = config.replace(/IIb|iib/g, keys[(keyIndex + 1) % 12]);
340:     config = config.replace(/II|ii/g, keys[(keyIndex + 2) % 12]);
341:     config = config.replace(/IV|iv/g, keys[(keyIndex + 5) % 12]);
342:     config = config.replace(/VIIb|viib/g, keys[(keyIndex + 10) % 12]);
343:     config = config.replace(/VII|vii/g, keys[(keyIndex + 11) % 12]);
344:     config = config.replace(/VIb|vib/g, keys[(keyIndex + 8) % 12]);
345:     config = config.replace(/VI|vi/g, keys[(keyIndex + 9) % 12]);
346:     config = config.replace(/I|i/g, keys[keyIndex]);
347:     config = config.replace(/Vb|vb/g, keys[(keyIndex + 6) % 12]);
348:     config = config.replace(/V|v/g, keys[(keyIndex + 7) % 12]);
349: 
350:     return config
351:       .split('|')
352:       .map((config) => ({ index: keyIndex, chord: config }));
353:   }
354: 
355:   openShortcuts() {
356:     const dialog = document.querySelector('#shortcuts') as HTMLDialogElement;
357:     dialog.showModal();
358:   }
359: 
360:   closeShortcuts() {
361:     const dialog = document.querySelector('#shortcuts') as HTMLDialogElement;
362:     dialog.close();
363:   }
364: 
365:   private updateProbabilityMap() {
366:     this.probabilityMap = {};
367:     this.probabilityCount = 0;
368: 
369:     this.keysConfiguration.keys.forEach((key, index) => {
370:       for (let i = 0; i < 6 - key.rating; i++) {
371:         this.probabilityMap[this.probabilityCount] = index;
372:         this.probabilityCount++;
373:       }
374:     });
375:   }
376: 
377:   private saveConfiguration() {
378:     if (this.initialized) {
379:       localStorage.setItem('tempo', this.toneService.tempo().toString());
380:       localStorage.setItem('mode', this.selectedMode().toString());
381:       localStorage.setItem('exercise', this.selectedExercise().name);
382:       localStorage.setItem(
383:         'playRootNote',
384:         this.toneService.playRootNote.toString(),
385:       );
386:       localStorage.setItem(
387:         'keysConfiguration',
388:         JSON.stringify(this.keysConfiguration),
389:       );
390: 
391:       this.updateProbabilityMap();
392:     }
393:   }
394: 
395:   private loadConfiguration() {
396:     this.toneService.setTempo(
397:       JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('tempo') ?? '60'),
398:     );
399:     this.setExercise(
400:       localStorage.getItem('exercise') ?? this.exercises[0].name,
401:     );
402:     this.setMode(
403:       (localStorage.getItem('mode') as 'R' | 'WC' | number) ??
404:         this.modes[0].key,
405:     );
406:     this.toneService.playRootNote =
407:       localStorage.getItem('playRootNote') === 'true';
408: 
409:     if (localStorage.getItem('keysConfiguration')) {
410:       try {
411:         this.keysConfiguration = JSON.parse(
412:           localStorage.getItem('keysConfiguration') ?? '{ keys: [] }',
413:         );
414:       } catch (error) {
415:         this.keysConfiguration = new KeysConfiguration();
416:       }
417: 
418:       if (this.keysConfiguration.keys?.length !== this.keys.length) {
419:         this.keysConfiguration = new KeysConfiguration();
420:       }
421:     } else {
422:       this.keysConfiguration = new KeysConfiguration();
423:     }
424: 
425:     const customExercise = localStorage.getItem('customExercise');
426:     if (customExercise) {
427:       const custom = this.exercises.find((e) => e.name === 'Custom');
428:       if (custom) {
429:         custom.configuration = customExercise;
430:       }
431:     }
432: 
433:     this.updateProbabilityMap();
434:   }
435: }

(End of file - total 435 lines)
</content>

22:       .pipe(takeUntilDestroyed(this.destroyRef))
23:       .subscribe(() => {

25:           this.isMobile.set(true);

parts.text: Now I have a good understanding of the codebase. Let me create a detailed implementation plan as a Markdown file:

I've created a detailed implementation plan for the named configurations feature. The plan is saved as `SAVED_CONFIGURATIONS_PLAN.md` in the jazz-chord-flashcards directory.

The plan covers:

1. **Current State Analysis** - Understanding how configuration is currently stored and managed
2. **Proposed Local Storage Structure** - Using an array of `SavedConfiguration` objects with UUIDs
3. **New Model and Service** - `SavedConfiguration` interface and `ConfigurationService` to manage all persistence
4. **Component Changes** - Modifications needed to PlayerComponent and new dialog components
5. **UI Integration** - New buttons and display for managing configurations
6. **Migration Strategy** - For backward compatibility with existing single configuration storage
7. **Complete File List** - All new files needed and modifications to existing files
8. **Implementation Order** - Step-by-step approach to implement the feature

Would you like me to proceed with the implementation, or would you like to review and modify the plan first?
